title: Enchancement Overruled
description: Enchancement Overruled, fixes minor issues with enchancement like bugs or things which nobody likes.
body:
# Enchancement Overruled A small mod which fixes issues with Enchancement. ## 📖 What's this mod? Enchancement Overruled is a mod which is made to fix minor issues with enchancement. All the changes made is based on what i've heard the community say and what i personally think shold be changed. ## ✅ Features. - Adds a new enchantment named Weaving: Increases mobility through cobwebs and air. - Fixes the issue with people abusing the config to change the base coyote bite values, by locking it to the default 3 ticks. - Removes the wardenspine darkness since nobody really likes it. - Leech now doesn't effect movement and does 1 less heart. - Slightly buffs scatter ## ❓ Q&A
Can I use this in my modpack? Yes.
I have an issue. Where can I report it? Issues can be reported in the help channel of the Discord.
Can you port this to Forge/Neoforge/Quilt? No. I only make mods for Fabric and won't port them for other mod loaders. If you want to make a branch of the mod for another loader, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
Can you backport the mod to version `x.xx`? No. I make mods for the latest version of the game and will not backport them. Similarly to Question 1, if you want to make a branch of the mod for another version of the game, join the Discord and ask for the permission in the **Help** channel. It will almost always be given, but please ask first.
